texto: Usually when I enter a bookstore, I feel immediately calm. Bookstores are, for me, what churches are for other people. My breath gets slower and deeper as I peruse the shelves. I believe that books contain messages I am meant to receive. I’m not normally superstitious, but I’ve even had books fall from shelves and land at my feet. Books are my missives from the universe.
explicacao: Citação de Laurie Horowitz sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Usually when I enter a bookstore, I feel immediately calm. Bookstores are, for me, what churches …” articula reflexao, books, bookstore em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao-noturna e bookstore.
